stemHtml: How does windshield coating repel rain?

options.a: The coating mixes with the raindrops, increasing the windshield`s transparency.
options.b: The hydrophobic property of the coating causes raindrops to reduce in size so that they become almost invisible.
options.c: The hydrophobic property of the coating causes raindrops to bead up and roll off the windshield.
options.d: The coating causes raindrops to form a thin, transparent layer of water on the windshield.
